# konnect_portal_team_role (Resource)

PortalTeamRole Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_portal_team_role" "my_portalteamrole" {
  entity_id        = "e67490ce-44dc-4cbd-b65e-b52c746fc26a"
  entity_region    = "eu"
  entity_type_name = "Services"
  portal_id        = "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  role_name        = "API Viewer"
  team_id          = "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_id` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `entity_region` (String) Region of the entity. possible known values include one of ["us", "eu", "au", "me", "in", "sg", "*"]; Requires replacement if changed.
- `entity_type_name` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `portal_id` (String) The Portal identifier. Requires replacement if changed.
- `role_name` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `team_id` (String) ID of the team. Requires replacement if changed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
